title: Buffed Mobs
description: Speeds up mobs so it's harder to outrun them, and also makes some of them stronger.
body:
## **In Minecraft Classic, four iconic mobs were added to the game.**
### Zombies, skeletons, spiders, and creepers.

**Since then, sprinting was added, enchantments were added, and shields were added...**

It is now incredibly easy to survive an encounter with any of the original hostile mobs. All you have to do is run, block, or fight back with enchanted weapons.

"Surviving the first night" let's play videos are a thing of the past, because there's no tension anymore.

Creepers lost their meme status as house stealers and grim reapers, because they can't chase you if you run 16 blocks away, and they no longer strafe when they hiss.

### **And no one is afraid of the dark anymore...**

## This datapack fixes that ;]
(or at least I tried to)

With this datapack, mobs are _harder, better, faster, stronger_.

I tried my best to rebalance mob stats and make mobs just as menacing as they were in Minecraft beta, taking into account the addition of sprinting and other features in modern Minecraft. For example, since you couldn't easily outrun spiders in Minecraft beta without sprinting, you can't easily outrun spiders in this datapack WITH sprinting >:]

While a mod would be better than a datapack (datapacks can't edit specific behaviors of mobs), I don't really know how to make a mod. If you develop mods, feel free to make a mod that takes my balancing ideas and improves on them :]

### Changes:
- ALL zombie variants (except for babies) have increased melee damage to match how much they had in beta (melee damage was nerfed in modern Minecraft).
- All classic mobs are sped up just enough that it is equally as hard to run from them WITH sprinting, as it was to run from them in old Minecraft (which didn't have sprinting).
- Increased the follow range of skeletons, creepers, and ghasts (this does not affect the aggro range of these mobs, datapacks can't change that unfortunately).
Zombies: 40
Skeletons: 16 -> 32
Spiders: 16
Creepers: 16 -> 48
Ghasts: 64 -> 128
